programme.title: Young Indiana Jones and the Phantom Train of Doom
programme.desc: Indy and his friend Remy infiltrate German lines in 1916 Africa to knock a dangerous cannon out of commission

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Teknobot

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is firing all the cannonballs on Captain Kidds island to retrieve the gold hidden inside of them Their activity draws the attention of MASK

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Presto falls for and must help a girl who can cast powerfully realistic illusions

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: A tussle with a comet hurls the Pride and crew twenty-five years back in time to Jayces home planet They search and find Audric when he was a student Jayce tells him he is his son and after much hesitation Audric almost believes him

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Lana is happy to be reunited with her long-lost brother Lyle on the distant video world of Tetris Kevin and Lyle join forces to stop Mother Brain from taking Tetriss power source the Sacred Square

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Man from Music Mountain
programme.desc: When nasty land developers try to bilk honest ranchers who dont know their land holds lots of gold Gene puts a stop to it

programme.title: The Oklahoma Cyclone
programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: Bells of San Angelo

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Rim of the Canyon
programme.desc: ene Autrys stolen horse turns up in a ghost town where Gene goes after he is left stranded during a stagecoach race

programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Lana is happy to be reunited with her long-lost brother Lyle on the distant video world of Tetris Kevin and Lyle join forces to stop Mother Brain from taking Tetriss power source the Sacred Square

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD is threatening to steal the King of Fuzugs treasure Inspector Gadgets mission is to save the treasure from Dr Claw

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: The Great Grape Ape

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A high school track star haunted by the recent death of her Olympic-medalist mother is given her mothers magic crystal amulet which brings to life her secret ambitions and extracts vengeance upon those who cause her pain

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An abnormally difficult child tests a psychologist

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A gunfighter confronts his past

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: American diplomat in Paris who built his career on shady dealings loses everything when everyone suddenly become aware of the skeletons in his closet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A psychologist causes the terrors of a disturbed patient hes treating to haunt him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick goes undercover and joins a cult to investigate the death of a city officials son

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan pose as members of a religious sect to track down a patchwork quilt that is thought to have deadly powers

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys have planned some entertainment for the Base Personnel but Binghamton puts a stop to it and orders McHale and his Crew to ferry him to a Staff Meeting so that he can keep an eye on them But after the 73 is put out of commission by a Japanese plane Binghamton if forced to do some entertaining of his own during a mission to obtain some fuel on a Japanese-held island

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While trying to impress a pretty Nurse Parker receives several serious blows to his morale and humiliated he puts in for a transfer Then complications arise when McHale The Crew and the Nurse work up a plan to try to help him to regain his self-esteem and change his mind

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A mix-up leads Carter to believe Gomers dying

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professor makes a dye marker to help get rescued The Skipper plans to join the Navy when they get home but he finds out he must lose weight to meet their requirements--and Gilligan finds out that he must gain weight too

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that a celebrated eccentric artist is on the island and they try to trick him into wanting to return to civilization so that they can use his transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpas innate honesty saves the day when a dishonest real estate speculator tries to buy five unproductive acres of the McCoys land for considerably less than its actual value

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa has Luke prepared for the worst when it is learned that Kates mother is coming for a visit but everyone is surprised when she arrives and repeatedly chides Kate for being insufficiently attentive to Lukes needs

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: After Max hides some secret plans he has to go into a jail to retrieve them

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: The deadliest of the species A woman pretends to love Max so she can kill him

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: A team has made a super computer police car that can tell everything wrong with vehicles generating huge for police depts FBI etc They target and harass BJ McKay and others to put them out of business BJ and his friends decide to fight back against this car that seems to know their every step

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is suffering from feelings of rejection so he moves to the beach to live with a group of outcast beatniks Roger owns the beach property and he wants to evict the whole lot of them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger brings home an inventor-friends homemade lie detector and he hooks it up to Wilbur who later hooks it up to Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: During an operation to send out twenty Allied soldiers two of them attempt an early escape and are nearly captured

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan talks Klink into building an officers club whereby a boat can be built to sail away with an escaped British POW and the German gunsight he snagged while escaping

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to Romanavia to retrieve the royal seal that has been stolen by MAD

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw causes dairy cows to stop producing milk so people will have to buy products from his store

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: During World War II a top-secret Australian attack unit penetrates Japanese lines to perform a daring rescue mission to rescue the American crew of a crashed plane

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler

programme.title: Love Boat 116
programme.desc: Love Boat 116

programme.title: Howling III
programme.desc: A female werewolf runs away from her family and falls in love with a man who works in the movie business while a sociologist searches for proof of the werewolves existence

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy loses her job at the Boars Nest for asking for a raise Enos suggests she apply to become a deputy with the Hazzard County Sheriffs Department Boss and acting Sheriff Grady Byrd rig the tests but Daisy passes them all She more than proves her worth when she takes on a pair of experienced bank robbers

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandovals CVI is breaking down While Dr Belman tries to remove it before implanting a new one Sandoval escapes He wants to rescue his wife DeeDee

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: To escape capture an alien merges with a pregnant woman This causes unexpected consequences for the aliens and for Blackwoods team - and violence for the hospital staff when the womanalien goes into labor

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane has created a poison engineered to specifically target Swamp Things genetic code Ann has discovered a method of temporarily changing Alec back to human form

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Temporally displaced Confederate Civil War soldiers appear in the swamp one of whom is a previous residence of Wills house Will helps the man to discover the mystery behind his wartime disappearance and make peace with his past so he can pass on

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A transmission from Dr Logan in Texas City leads the Alphans to believe that they can finally land back on Earth through a revolutionary teleportation process The downside is that it is now 2120 on Earth and the surface has become an unbreathable wasteland through centuries of pollution The Alphans though are intent on abandoning the wandering moon However due to a hitch the Alphan test subjects find themselves in a primitive and hostile environment It is Scotland in the fourteenth century where the Scots are at war with the English invaders who kidnap the Alphan trio

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A new couples soon-to-be opened general store is invaded by criminals to be used for a tunnel to rob the Barkleys of their gold and the couples husband is apparently involved

programme.title: Chey 411
programme.desc: Chey 411

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Three band members have the perfect racket a diamond heist But one guy sees the driver and then makes that known on public TV

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A top mob leader Frank Wayne is endangering the US economy Phelpss plan attacks Wayne on various fronts First the IMF watches as Jimmy Bibo one of Waynes associates is forced to dig his own grave The IMF has a doctor ready to revive Bibo -- if Waynes killer leaves the scene in time Second Phelps has a cover as an ambitious prosecutor on Waynes trail Finally Rollin is ready to take Waynes place But once Rollin has made the switch other mob bosses want Wayne to leave the country -- which will ruin the complicated plan

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Working at a remote construction site Dr Kimble tries protect a coworker with a low IQ from being lynched when the caring married woman whos been teaching him to read is assaulted by an unknown attacker

programme.title: What to See and Do
programme.desc: Follow Second Sight Paranormal as they visit Seville Quarter Destin Harbor Boardwalk, where the city of Destin started Bloody Mary Festival in Miramar Beach Flo"

programme.title: Music Scene
programme.desc: Lakelin-Lemmings-Parking-Lot Jet Jurgensmeyer Good Days I'm here with her newest release, Me Time. Brooke's last single, Hello Texas releases today. Summer a"

programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand Amazing Elephants Ep 006

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: The Scarlet and The Black
programme.desc: Vatican efforts led by Monsignor Hugh OFlaherty to save Allied POWs and downed Allied airmen as the Nazis invade Rome

programme.title: KILL ROMMEL
programme.desc: During WWII US Lieutenant Morris and British captain Hull are assigned in a mission to kill Rommel

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: Nightbreed
programme.desc: A troubled young man is drawn to a mythical place called Midian where a variety of friendly monsters are hiding from humanity Meanwhile a sadistic serial killer is looking for a patsy

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Night of the Demons
programme.desc: Night of the Demons is a 1988 American supernatural horror film directed by Kevin S Tenney written and produced by Joe Augustyn and starring Amelia Kinkade Cathy Podewell Linnea Quigley Hal Havins and Alvin Alexis

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Some are drawn to MMA to better themselves as people. When they do so, they also train to be top athletes. Lee Popp is no exception. At HK35, Lee takes on Dauda Keita for the Amateur Lightweight Title Belt.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 opens with a pro match between always threatening Zach Manywounds and Trenton Rowell, hungry for his first win. Following is Keegan ""the Condition"" Oliver vs. Hard Knocks newcomer, Vaz Lep. The main event of the evening is welterweight matchup between two exciting Hard Knocks veterans: Joel Powell vs. Adam Smith.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Colton Boxell

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Pouria Rashidi v. Dominic Dillon

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Yassin Baitar v. Jonay Risco

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Connor Hayes v. Arydas Pumputis

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 continues with some hard hitting action in MMA! This episode features an amateur matchup between Joe Mapanda and debut Sheldon Williams. Following are pros Dusty Kramps vs. former Hard Knocks Amateur Champion, Devon Smith. Our final fight for the evening is a pro bout between dynamic fighters Justin Schmit and Vyron Phillips.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget with the help of his niece Penny stops MAD agents from stealing gold from the ancient City of Gold and uncover a real gold temple

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Taking the part of a knight starring opposite the famous Lana Lamour a MAD agent in disguise in a MAD movie Inspector Gadget saves the military secrets from falling into MADs hands

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Scooter trades in his holographic powers for a powerful new blaster and learns that power isnt all its cracked up to be

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegade wreak havoc on Earth while disguised as Guardians and the terrified humans ask Leader-1 to take his people off Earth

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Neetra manages to get a message out regarding her planet Tekka Monster Minds are about to attack to acquire their powerful fuel miran to power his missiles The Vertim and Batim colonies rival each other for control of the pyramid made of miran

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Lost and dangerously low on fuel the Lightning League searches for Gate World a legendary gateway to any spot in the universe Gillian adapts the scanner and the Pride lands in the centre of some stonework on a beautiful planet

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM kidnaps panda bears from China and transports them Easter Island Its up to MASK figure out how to rescue the bears who have been put in harms way

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM terrorizes Tokyo Japan using a new vehicle called Blackout which is capable of draining electrical power supplies

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger
